prestazioni: LT4 6.2L V8 (engine code: LT4) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression pistons, Callies Compstar crankshaft, and Manley H-beam connecting rods, paired with a custom Hennessey billet aluminum supercharger pulley (2.3L displacement, 12 psi boost) and a ported Eaton TVS2650 supercharger housing for optimized airflow

Hennessey-spec fuel system upgrade featuring dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors, and a custom Motec M150 ECU with Exorcist-specific calibration for 1,000+ HP on E85 fuel blend

Custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with Borla Pro XS mufflers, titanium-coated headers by Stainless Works, and a secondary bypass valve system for on-demand backpressure reduction, paired with a custom titanium driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop
estetica: Hennessey Exorcist-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts by Anderson Composites, featuring integrated cooling ducts for the LT4 intercooler and rear differential
Custom carbon fiber hood with dual functional heat extractors and a central ram-air intake, manufactured by Seibon Carbon, finished in matte clear coat with Hennessey Exorcist ghost graphics

Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension with custom valving for the Camaro ZL1 chassis, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers, 400mm two-piece rotors, and Pagid RS29 brake pads, all mounted on HRE FF01 20x11-inch forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/30R20)
